case_title: HA MAN TSE VS. MICHAEL J. CHANG ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
DECLARATION RE: LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 128-130 LELAND AVE., SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94134, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN SERVED NOV-14-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J. DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN SERVED NOV-14-2018, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $133.33 PER DAY (DAILY RENTAL VALUE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSE, HA MAN
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, ORDER (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS) (COPY IN DEPT. 501 OUTBOX)
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, MICHAEL J.
